scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "${npm_config_user_agent}${npm_execpath}" in *pnpm*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:libs && bun run --filter './artifacts/*' --filter './scripts' typecheck
